name: Heavenly Wings
recipeInstructions:
1 Wash wings and pat dry. Cut pieces at joints, discarding wing tips.
2 Combine remaining ingredients in a small bowl.
3 Place wings in a shallow baking dish, careful not to crowd them.
4 Pour the sauce over the wings.
5 Marinade overnight in the refrigerator.
6 Leave the marinade in the pan.
7 Bake wings at 325 degrees F. (163 degrees C.) for 1 1/2 hours.
